arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works S730: The aftermath of Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen; Is Joshua Kimmich wearing down?; Heat check on Vincent Kompany; Jamal Musiala inked his new deal; and MORE!
arts.sum: Let’s talk about all of that and more on this edition of the Bavarian Podcast Works Show! Bayern Munich earned a point during its trip to BayArena, but doubt and frustration with the squad’s recent performances have some fans feeling uneasy.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlović okay with draw vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlović was pragmatic about his team’s 0-0 draw with Bayer Leverkusen in the BayArena on Saturday. Looking for more thoughts and analysis on Bayern Munich’s frustrating 0-0 draw with Bayer Leverkusen?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich predicted XI vs. Celtic: Possible starting lineup as Vincent Kompany looks to qualify for round of 16
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Bayern Munich could line up for Tuesday's Champions League clash with Celtic at Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Celtic predicted XI vs. Bayern Munich: Possible starting lineup as Brendan Rodgers faces Jota decision in Champions League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Celtic could line up for Tuesday's Champions League clash with Bayern Munich at Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor challenges Celtic to max out against Bayern and force Europe to sit up and take notice
arts.sum: McGregor knows it will take the performance of his career but insists Brendan Rodgers' side can shock the whole continent

arts.ttl: Celtic take German lessons to avert 'absolute thumping'
arts.sum: After going two down to Bayern Munich, Celtic might have feared another heavy Champions League defeat. But Brendan Rodgers' side emerged beaten but "not broken".

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany attributes inability to play usual game to Bayer Leverkusen’s impressive display
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s performance in the 0-0 draw with Bayer Leverkusen was not pretty and it does not take a deep plunge into the stats to see this fact laid bare. Kompany is right to compliment the team for being forced into the unusual position of heavy underdogs and still holding on for the point.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen efforts tame Bayern Munich attack to previously unseen levels
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso's defending Bundesliga champions may not have been able to pick up maximum points in their crucial encounter against league leaders Bayern Munich, but Bayer 04 did manage to push their opponents towards an unwanted record in the teams' latest meeting. Ultimately, Leverkusen will be disappointed not have cut the gap to league-leaders Bayern as they instead remain eight points adrift with 12 games remaining, but the Werkself will take heart from the way they restricted the Bundesliga's highest goalscorers this term.

arts.ttl: Jim Goodwin blown away by 'quality' Celtic hero vs Dundee United
arts.sum: Reflecting on the defeat, Dundee United boss, Jim Goodwin picked out one Celtic hero as he said he can now understand why Brendan Rodgers shelled out a huge chunk of cash for him in the January transfer window. With a gap of 13 points now set at the top of the Scottish Premiership table and just 12 games left to play, Celtic are on course to win the 55th league title of their history at the end of this current season.

arts.ttl: Martin O’Neill playfully calls out Celtic’s Brendan Rodgers over Leicester decision
arts.sum: Martin O’Neill has been chatting to Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers ahead of their Champions League play-off second leg tie against Bayern Munich.
